# Restore reference — do not edit

This folder is a **read-only snapshot** of a fully working FleetPulse build, kept inside the main repo for reference.

- Use it to compare or copy files back into the main project when something is broken.
- Do not modify files here; the live project is the FleetPulse root folder.
- To run this snapshot in isolation: copy this folder elsewhere, then run `npm install` and `npm run dev` (and add `.env.local` with your env vars).

See `Restore Points/README.md` in the repo for more detail.
